Grey and Milky White in stock!!️
Original factory lining with cashmere✔️The Lady Diana that friends have been longing for is finally available in 4 compartments❤️. This size is between the 3-compartment and 5-compartment versions, practical and exquisite😌. It stands out when worn, elegant or casual, the best choice for various looks👏🏻
size:20cm

items.name_cn:
DI0R❣️Oblique Backpack 'Grey Canvas Large'
A DI0R Oblique backpack that can be a couple's item. Featuring a vintage print on canvas with a small metal logo, it is soft and cute. The canvas material is very lightweight, has a large capacity, and is small in weight with great style ~
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has been integrated into everyone's fashionable attitude ~ Carrying vintage items makes you feel like you're at Paris Fashion Week everywhere. Recommended🖤 for a couple's look
Large: 30×42×15CM
#088

items.name_cn:
💯Tech fabric backpack❣️
This DiorTravel Backpack is a refined and practical choice. Crafted from tech fabric and featuring a blue Reverse Jacquard pattern, it offers a fresh take on the iconic motif with a contrasting effect. The front is adorned with a "CHRISTIAN DIOR" logo, and it includes a zippered compartment and external pocket for easy storage of daily essentials. It comes with adjustable straps, allowing it to be carried by hand, over one shoulder, or on both shoulders.
Size: 20×12×28cm
Model: 6108

specs.rawTitle:
💯Tech fabric backpack❣️
This DiorTravel Backpack is a refined and practical choice. Crafted from tech fabric and featuring a blue Reverse Jacquard pattern, it offers a fresh take on the iconic motif with a contrasting effect. The front is adorned with a "CHRISTIAN DIOR" logo, and it includes a zippered compartment and external pocket for easy storage of daily essentials. It comes with adjustable straps, allowing it to be carried by hand, over one shoulder, or on both shoulders.
Size: 20×12×28cm
Model: 6108

items.name_cn:
♣️DiorTravel Backpack 'Blue Cloth Large'
This DiorTravel Backpack cleverly blends Dior's classic details with a stylish and practical design. Crafted from blue tech jacquard fabric and fully patterned with Oblique, it features a prominent Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious main compartment has a zipper for easy access to daily items. It comes with a handle and shoulder straps, suitable for shoulder or backpack carrying.
Front features Christian Dior Paris logo
Adjustable straps
Front zippered pocket
Model: 096
Size: 35 x 41 x 15 cm (L x H x W)
Spacious enough to hold a 15-inch laptop, a clutch, a wallet, a phone, two card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
(Large) DI0R Oblique 2019s Backpack
A couple's style DI0R Oblique backpack. In addition to the vintage pattern, it features small metal logos, giving it a soft and cute look. The canvas material is very lightweight, has a large capacity, and is practical with a great appearance ~
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has integrated into everyone's fashionable attitude~ Carrying vintage items makes you feel like you're at Paris Fashion Week wherever you go. Highly recommended🖤 for a couple's look
Large: 29×14×36 CM
Small: 23.5×11×32 CM
#088#510

items.name_cn:
Code: 666203
[MCM] Anya Mini Basket Bag has two carrying options: use the rivet top handle or a detachable shoulder strap. This small bag is crafted from Visetos print coated canvas with a checkered interior, a top zipper to protect personal items, and is an ideal choice for travel. Detachable leather shoulder strap
Rivet-decorated leather handle
Top zipper closure
Single bag, printed cotton-texture canvas lining
Dimensions: 20x17x9cm

items.name_cn:
MCM Stark Visetos
Medium-Large Rivet Backpack
Newly Upgraded Version
Exclusive®️ Cognac print full coverage
Unisex backpack # The ceiling of backpacks. This backpack has a structured shape and is adorned with luxurious Nappa leather trim, ample interior space, and pyramid rivets on the sides for a bold look.
Model: MMK6SVE37CO001
Dimensions: 38*13*30cm
Strap: 71-87cm adjustable
Zipper: Dual-direction full closure
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾
